jobs.name: cohida-gh-actions-watch
jobs.script:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
marker="$HOME/.cache/cohida-run-26422926896-notified"
status=$(gh run view 26422926896 --json status --jq .status)
conclusion=$(gh run view 26422926896 --json conclusion --jq .conclusion)
if [ "$status" != "completed" ]; then
  exit 0
fi
if [ -f "$marker" ]; then
  exit 0
fi
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$marker")"
printf 'GitHub Actions run 26422926896 completed: %s\n' "$conclusion"
touch "$marker"
